hermes.goal: Beat buy-and-hold (positive alpha vs BTC) while keeping max drawdown under 15% and never risking the mandate on a single trade — capital preservation first. Near-term: prove a sustained, fee-aware, positive out-of-sample edge on the paper trainer over ~90 days before scaling any live capital; grow the live account only on demonstrated alpha.

brain.commentary: The council’s signals are broadly defensive: all composites are negative or near‑zero, alphas are weak or negative, and volatilities are elevated (especially ETH and SOL). Beta >1 for BTC and ETH amplifies market risk, while SOL’s long bias rests on a marginal composite and a sizable negative alpha, making its signal fragile. To preserve capital we trim the modest long tilts and keep the net exposure below the typical balanced‑risk band.
